summary: Bug fixes verified: 1) WebSocket reconnection limited to 3 attempts with exponential backoff, 2) Impression pixels stored and returned via API, 3) Frequency capping fields editable in campaign wizard, 4) Login/logout works without postMessage errors. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: Minor: Recharts warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - does not affect functionality

Minor: HTML nesting warning -
inside

tag in Badge component - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket reconnection in NotificationContext.jsx correctly limits to 3 attempts with exponential backoff
Response interceptor in api.js creates clean error objects to prevent postMessage cloning issues
Frequency capping inputs in ScheduleStep.jsx use nullish coalescing (??) and proper onChange handlers
Impression pixels are properly stored in creatives collection and returned via GET /api/creatives/{id}
Backend openrtb_handler.py injects impression pixels into adm field for banner, video, native, and js_tag creatives
seed_data_creation: Created test creatives and campaigns with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bugs verified fixed: 1) WebSocket reconnection now limited to 3 attempts - console logs show 'Attempting to reconnect in 5000ms (attempt 1/3)...', 2) Impression pixels section visible in creative editor with Add Pixel button, API stores and returns impression_pixels array, 3) Frequency capping fields (Max Impressions, Period, Cap Type) are all editable in Schedule & pacing step of campaign wizard. No postMessage errors observed during login/logout.

websocket_reconnection.details: Console logs show 'Attempting to reconnect in 5000ms (attempt 1/3)...' confirming max 3 attempts with exponential backoff

tests: POST /api/creatives with impression_pixels array - stores correctly

frontend_ui.details: Impression Pixels section visible in creative editor with Add Pixel button

bid_response_injection.details: openrtb_handler.py build_response() method injects impression pixels into adm for banner, video, native, and js_tag creatives

fields_tested: Max Impressions input - editable, set to 5
Period dropdown - editable, changed from Per Day to Per Week
Cap Type dropdown - editable, changed from Per User to Per Campaign
Daily Cap (per user) input - visible when Cap Type is Per User
Lifetime Cap (per user) input - visible when Cap Type is Per User

login_logout.details: No postMessage errors in console during login/logout. Response interceptor in api.js creates clean error objects.
